_comment: GEO-optimized topic taxonomy for Lua. Topics are phrased as the questions people actually ask LLMs and search engines. Clustered into pillars for internal linking + topical authority. Pick topics within underserved pillars first to build coverage breadth.
_geo_note: Question-shaped titles get extracted and cited by ChatGPT/Perplexity/Google AI Overviews far more than noun-phrase titles. Each topic below should become an H2 question with a direct 1-2 sentence answer immediately under it.
